title: Daoist Canon: Xuanmen Riyong Jing (Section 7)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Xuanmen Riyong Jing
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Xuanmen Riyong Jing

translation.text: From the Xuanmen Riyong Jing of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
